name: Diamond Street
description: Westside Varrio Diamond Street is a predominately Hispanic street gang located in the Westlake area of Los Angeles just west of Downtown LA. They are one of the few Chicano gangs that continues to sign their graffiti with the phrase "C/S" or "Con Safos," a Chicano phrase that was extremely popular from the 1940s through the 1970s, but began loosing popularity in the 1980s and 1990s.

sources.title: Diamond Street near Downtown Los Angeles — StreetGangs
